    • FAQs

      Questions you may have, answered with
      • How does the battery life compare in daily usage?
        Battery life is crucial for daily convenience. Check the battery capacity (measured in mAh) and read reviews about real-world battery performance, including talk time and standby time. Also, consider if the phone supports fast charging or wireless charging, which can enhance usability.
